verdict_reason: Well-formed pure unit test matching the recommended exception-handler pattern with behaviour-based AssertJ assertions; only two Minor convention deviations (test naming and missing Given/When/Then blocks).

todos.issue: Test method names use {subject}_{doesWhat} (handleUnreadableBody_returns400WithErrorMessage, handleGatewayException_returns502WithErrorMessage) instead of the project convention {subject}_{shouldDoWhat}
Tests lack the explicit // Given, // When, // Then comment blocks the unit-testing guide mandates for all tests
todos.fix: Add // Given / // When / // Then (or combined // When & Then) comment blocks to both test methods
